name: Columbine
description_short: This is not a financial services company. The URL provided links to a History.com article about the April 20, 1999 Columbine High School shooting tragedy.
description_long: CRITICAL FINDING: The entity 'Columbine' listed as a payday-alternatives company does not exist as a financial services provider. The website URL (https://www.history.com/articles/columbine-high-school-shootings) redirects to an educational history article about the Columbine High School shooting that occurred on April 20, 1999 in Littleton, Colorado. This was a mass casualty event in which two teenagers killed 13 people and wounded over 20 others before taking their own lives. The article documents the victims, perpetrators (Eric Harris and Dylan Klebold), investigation findings, and aftermath—not financial services of any kind. There is no lending platform, credit union, employer advance program, or alternative financial product associated with 'Columbine.' The listing appears to be either a data entry error, a defunct company, or a fraudulent entry attempting to exploit a tragic historical event. No financial services, products, loan terms, APR rates, or consumer offerings are mentioned in any of the website content. This profile cannot be completed because the subject is not a legitimate financial services company.
